title: [Apache Flink 0.6.1 available](</2014/09/26/apache-flink-0.6.1-available/>)
summary:
#  Apache Flink 0.6.1 available
September 26, 2014 -
We are happy to announce the availability of Flink 0.6.1.
0.6.1 is a maintenance release, which includes minor fixes across several parts of the system. We suggest all users of Flink to w…
